title: euchroma coccinea
intro: Euchroma coccinea, also known as the Red Euchroma or Red Flowering Tree, is a flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euchroma coccinea include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
